# How to Network

```{=html}
<style>
/* -- CHAPTER NAV TABS -- */
.htn-chapter-nav {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 3rem;
  padding: 0.35rem;
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 50px;
  width: fit-content;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.htn-nav-btn {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 50px;
  transition: all 0.18s;
  white-space: nowrap;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
.htn-nav-btn:hover {
  color: var(--navy);
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.htn-nav-btn.active {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(13,27,42,0.18);
}

/* -- PANELS -- */
.htn-panel { display: none; }
.htn-panel.active { display: block; }

.htn-section-intro {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
}

/* -- TIP BOX -- */
.htn-tip-box {
  background: var(--teal-light);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--teal);
  border-radius: 0 var(--radius-sm) var(--radius-sm) 0;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem;
  font-size: 0.93rem;
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.75;
  margin: 1rem 0;
}
.htn-tip-box p { margin: 0; }
.htn-tip-box strong { color: var(--navy); }

/* -- REASON CARDS -- */
.htn-reason-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.4rem 0;
}
.htn-reason-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.3rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  transition: box-shadow 0.18s, transform 0.18s;
}
.htn-reason-card:hover {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.htn-reason-icon {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.htn-reason-title {
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--navy);
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.htn-reason-desc {
  font-size: 0.83rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* -- PLATFORM CARDS -- */
.htn-platform-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.4rem 0;
}
.htn-platform-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.4rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  transition: box-shadow 0.18s, transform 0.18s;
}
.htn-platform-card:hover {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.htn-platform-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
.htn-platform-name {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--navy);
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.htn-platform-desc {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.htn-bullet-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.9;
}
.htn-bullet-list li::before {
  content: "◆ ";
  color: var(--teal);
  font-size: 0.5rem;
  vertical-align: middle;
  margin-right: 0.3rem;
}

/* -- IN-PERSON CARDS -- */
.htn-inperson-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.4rem 0;
}
.htn-inperson-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.3rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  transition: box-shadow 0.18s, transform 0.18s;
}
.htn-inperson-card:hover {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.htn-inperson-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
.htn-inperson-title {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--navy);
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.htn-inperson-desc {
  font-size: 0.83rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

/* -- EMAIL TEMPLATE -- */
.ifu-email-wrap {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 1.4rem 0;
}
.ifu-email-header {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 0.9rem 1.4rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}
.ifu-email-body {
  padding: 1.4rem;
  font-size: 0.93rem;
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.85;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}
.ifu-email-highlight { color: var(--teal); font-weight: 700; }

/* -- CHECKLIST -- */
.htn-checklist-wrap {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 1.4rem 0;
}
.htn-checklist-header {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}
.htn-checklist-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0.95rem 1.4rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.htn-checklist-item:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
.htn-checklist-item:hover { background: var(--surface); }
.htn-checklist-item.checked { background: #f0fdf4; }
.htn-checklist-item.checked .htn-checklist-text {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-decoration: line-through;
}
.htn-checklist-checkbox {
  width: 20px; height: 20px;
  border: 2px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 5px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-top: 1px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: all 0.15s;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #fff;
}
.htn-checklist-item.checked .htn-checklist-checkbox {
  background: var(--teal);
  border-color: var(--teal);
}
.htn-checklist-text {
  font-size: 0.93rem;
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.5;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.htn-checklist-footer {
  padding: 0.9rem 1.4rem;
  background: var(--surface);
  border-top: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.htn-progress-bar {
  flex: 1;
  height: 8px;
  background: var(--border);
  border-radius: 50px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.htn-progress-fill {
  height: 100%;
  background: var(--teal);
  border-radius: 50px;
  transition: width 0.3s ease;
}
.htn-progress-label {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.htn-checklist-reset {
  background: none;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 50px;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.8rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.15s;
}
.htn-checklist-reset:hover { border-color: var(--teal); color: var(--teal); }
</style>

<!-- Chapter Navigation -->
<div class="htn-chapter-nav htn-nav">
  <button class="htn-nav-btn active" onclick="htnShowPanel('htn-overview', this)">Overview</button>
  <button class="htn-nav-btn" onclick="htnShowPanel('htn-why', this)">Why</button>
  <button class="htn-nav-btn" onclick="htnShowPanel('htn-online', this)">Online Networking</button>
  <button class="htn-nav-btn" onclick="htnShowPanel('htn-inperson', this)">In-Person Networking</button>
  <button class="htn-nav-btn" onclick="htnShowPanel('htn-checklist', this)">Checklist</button>
</div>

<!-- PANEL 0: OVERVIEW -->
<div id="htn-overview" class="htn-panel active">
  <h2 style="margin-top:0;">Chapter Overview</h2>

  <div style="background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:2rem 2.4rem;margin-bottom:1.8rem;box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);">
    <div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.6rem;">Chapter Overview</div>
    <div style="font-size:1rem;color:var(--text-body);line-height:1.7;max-width:640px;">This chapter shows you how to build meaningful connections that lead to opportunities, and how to network in a way that feels natural and authentic.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.2rem;margin-bottom:1.8rem;">
    <div style="background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.4rem;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
      <div style="font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.7rem;">What You Will Learn</div>
      <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-body);line-height:2;">
        <li>&#10003;&nbsp; Why networking works and why most students underestimate it</li>
        <li>&#10003;&nbsp; How to build your presence on LinkedIn and GitHub</li>
        <li>&#10003;&nbsp; How to make the most of conferences, career fairs, and informational interviews</li>
        <li>&#10003;&nbsp; A checklist to keep your networking efforts consistent</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1.4rem;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
      <div style="font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.7rem;">What Is Inside</div>
      <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-body);line-height:2;">
        <li>&#9656;&nbsp; <strong>Why</strong> — The case for why networking is important</li>
        <li>&#9656;&nbsp; <strong>Online Networking</strong> — LinkedIn and GitHub strategies</li>
        <li>&#9656;&nbsp; <strong>In-Person Networking</strong> — Conferences, career fairs, and informational interviews</li>
        <li>&#9656;&nbsp; <strong>Checklist</strong> — Stay consistent with your networking efforts</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="htn-tip-box">
    <p><strong>How to use this chapter:</strong> Start with Why to understand the value of networking, then move to Online or In-Person depending on where you are starting. Use the Checklist to build a consistent habit and to make sure you are on track.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PANEL 1: WHY -->
<div id="htn-why" class="htn-panel">
  <h2 style="margin-top:0;">Why Networking Works</h2>
  <p class="htn-section-intro">Networking works because the job search process is not only about qualifications, but also about trust, visibility, and relationships. In many cases, employers are more likely to consider and hire applicants who are recommended, referred, or connected to someone within their organization.</p>

  <div class="htn-reason-grid">
    <div class="htn-reason-card">
      <div class="htn-reason-icon">🚪</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-title">Access the Hidden Job Market</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-desc">Many roles are shared internally or through current employees or connections before being posted publicly. Networking gets you access to opportunities that never appear on job boards.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-reason-card">
      <div class="htn-reason-icon">🤝</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-title">Build Trust Before You Apply</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-desc">Employers are more likely to consider applicants who come recommended by someone they already trust. A connection can turn a cold application into a warm referral.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-reason-card">
      <div class="htn-reason-icon">🎓</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-title">Especially Important as a New Grad</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-desc">Many applicants have similar degrees and backgrounds. Networking helps you differentiate yourself and stand out in a competitive pool where credentials alone are not enough.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-reason-card">
      <div class="htn-reason-icon">💡</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-title">Gain Insider Insight</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-desc">Connections give you access to information you cannot find on company websites, including what the culture is really like, what skills actually matter, and what the interview process looks like.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-reason-card">
      <div class="htn-reason-icon">📈</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-title">Supports Long-Term Career Growth</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-desc">Networking is not just for landing your first job. The connections you build now can guide and support you throughout your entire career, not just the immediate job search.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-reason-card">
      <div class="htn-reason-icon">🌐</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-title">Creates a Support System</div>
      <div class="htn-reason-desc">A strong network gives you people to turn to for advice, feedback, and encouragement. It becomes a professional support system that grows more valuable over time.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="htn-tip-box">
    <p><strong>Start early.</strong> You do not need a job offer pending to start networking. The best time to build relationships is before you need them, when there is no pressure and conversations can be genuinely curious rather than transactional.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PANEL 2: ONLINE NETWORKING -->
<div id="htn-online" class="htn-panel">
  <h2 style="margin-top:0;">Online Networking</h2>
  <p class="htn-section-intro">One of the best and most accessible ways to build connections is through online networking. Platforms like LinkedIn and GitHub allow students to engage with professionals, showcase their work and effort, and stay in-tune with trends in the industry.</p>

  <div class="htn-platform-grid">
    <div class="htn-platform-card">
      <div class="htn-platform-icon">💼</div>
      <div class="htn-platform-name">LinkedIn</div>
      <div class="htn-platform-desc">LinkedIn is an essential networking tool for students. It helps build executive presence, connect across industries, and showcase your talent and experience. </div>
      <p style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Your Profile Should Include:</p>
      <ul class="htn-bullet-list">
        <li>A professional photo</li>
        <li>A clear headline that reflects your current status and career goals</li>
        <li>Updated education and experience</li>
        <li>Projects, skills, and certifications</li>
        <li>A short summary describing your interests</li>
      </ul>
      <p style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--teal);margin:1rem 0 0.4rem;">How to Use It Effectively:</p>
      <ul class="htn-bullet-list">
        <li>Find and connect with alumni, recruiters, and professionals in your desired field</li>
        <li>Be active and engage with posts by liking and commenting</li>
        <li>Follow companies and events you are interested in</li>
        <li>Share updates about your progress, projects, and achievements</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-platform-card">
      <div class="htn-platform-icon">💻</div>
      <div class="htn-platform-name">GitHub and Open Source</div>
      <div class="htn-platform-desc">For technical roles, GitHub serves as both a portfolio and a networking tool. It lets you demonstrate your skills while connecting with other developers around real work.</div>
      <p style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.4rem;">A Strong GitHub Presence Shows:</p>
      <ul class="htn-bullet-list">
        <li>Technical ability through your projects</li>
        <li>Work ethic and consistency through commits</li>
        <li>Communication through documentation areas</li>
        <li>Collaboration and team-spirit through open-source contributions</li>
      </ul>
      <p style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--teal);margin:1rem 0 0.4rem;">Students can use GitHub to:</p>
      <ul class="htn-bullet-list">
        <li>Upload personal and academic projects</li>
        <li>Improve issues or documentation in existing repositories</li>
        <li>Participate in discussions or issues</li>
        <li>Contribute to open-source projects</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);color:var(--navy);font-size:1.2rem;margin:2rem 0 0.4rem;">Connection Request Example</h3>
  <p style="font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Personalize your LinkedIn connection requests. This small effort makes a noticeable difference.</p>

  <div class="ifu-email-wrap">
  <div class="ifu-email-header">💼 LinkedIn Connection Request Example</div>
  <div class="ifu-email-body"> Hi <span class="ifu-email-highlight">[Name]</span>, I came across your profile and saw your experience in <span class="ifu-email-highlight">[field]</span>. I am currently a student interested in this area and would love to connect and learn more from your experience.</div>
</div>

  <div class="htn-tip-box">
    <p><strong>Consistency matters.</strong> Being consistent with engagement on LinkedIn helps increase your visibility with professionals and showcase your drive in the job-hunt.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PANEL 3: IN-PERSON NETWORKING -->
<div id="htn-inperson" class="htn-panel">
  <h2 style="margin-top:0;">In-Person Networking</h2>
  <p class="htn-section-intro">While online networking is more easily accessible and convenient, in-person exchanges can create stronger and much more memorable connections. Interacting with people face-to-face allows for more human conversations and helps build trust more quickly. </p>

  <div class="htn-inperson-grid">
    <div class="htn-inperson-card">
      <div class="htn-inperson-icon">🎤</div>
      <div class="htn-inperson-title">Conferences and Meetups</div>
      <div class="htn-inperson-desc">Attending meetups and conferences can provide opportunities to learn from experienced professionals and connect with others in your field.</div>
      <p style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Tips for Attending:</p>
      <ul class="htn-bullet-list">
        <li>Prepare a short introduction about yourself</li>
        <li>Get insight and ask questions about others' experiences</li>
        <li>Connect on LinkedIn after meeting someone</li>
        <li>Follow up within a few days</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-inperson-card">
      <div class="htn-inperson-icon">🏢</div>
      <div class="htn-inperson-title">Career Fairs</div>
      <div class="htn-inperson-desc">Career fairs are a great way for students to get themselves out there. These events allow students to directly interact with recruiters and company representatives.</div>
      <p style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.4rem;">How to Prepare:</p>
      <ul class="htn-bullet-list">
        <li>Research companies attending in advance</li>
        <li>Identify your target companies and employers</li>
        <li>Bring printed copies of your resume</li>
        <li>Practice a 30-second introduction</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-inperson-card">
      <div class="htn-inperson-icon">☕</div>
      <div class="htn-inperson-title">Informational Interviews</div>
      <div class="htn-inperson-desc">An informational interview is a less-formal conversation with a professional where the goal is to learn and ask questions, not ask for a job.</div>
      <p style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:0.4rem;">What You Can Learn:</p>
      <ul class="htn-bullet-list">
        <li>What a role actually involves day to day</li>
        <li>How others entered the field</li>
        <li>Which skills matter most to develop</li>
        <li>Advice tailored to your specific career path</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);color:var(--navy);font-size:1.2rem;margin:2rem 0 0.4rem;">Why These Opportunities Are Beneficial</h3>
   <p style="font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">1. Exposure to trends and tools in the industry</p>
   <p style="font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">2. Opportunities to meet and talk with professionals in your field of interest</p>
   <p style="font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">3. Practice communicating in a professional and executive setting</p>

  <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);color:var(--navy);font-size:1.2rem;margin:2rem 0 0.4rem;">Your Introduction</h3>
  <p style="font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">A simple, confident introduction is all you need to start a conversation at any event. Keep it to four key elements:</p>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0.8rem;margin:1rem 0 1.4rem;">
    <div style="background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
      <div style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--teal);line-height:1;">1</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-top:0.3rem;">Your Name</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
      <div style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--teal);line-height:1;">2</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-top:0.3rem;">Your Major or Background</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
      <div style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--teal);line-height:1;">3</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-top:0.3rem;">Your Career Interests</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">
      <div style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--teal);line-height:1;">4</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-top:0.3rem;">The Role You Are Seeking</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);color:var(--navy);font-size:1.2rem;margin:2rem 0 0.4rem;">Informational Interview Request Example</h3>
  <p style="font-size:0.93rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Use this as a starting point when reaching out to someone for an informational interview.</p>

  <div class="ifu-email-wrap">
  <div class="ifu-email-header">☕ Informational Interview Request Example</div>
  <div class="ifu-email-body">Hi <span class="ifu-email-highlight">[Name]</span>, I came across your profile and saw your experience in <span class="ifu-email-highlight">[field]</span>. I am currently a student interested in this area and would love to connect and learn more from your experience. If you are available, I would love to have a brief conversation to gain more insight.</div>
</div>

  <div class="htn-tip-box">
    <p><strong>Always follow up.</strong> After any in-person conversation, connect on LinkedIn and send a short message within a few days referencing something specific from your exchange. Head to the Interview Follow-Up chapter for more insights.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PANEL 4: CHECKLIST -->
<div id="htn-checklist" class="htn-panel">
  <h2 style="margin-top:0;">Network Checklist</h2>
  <p class="htn-section-intro">Use this checklist to stay consistent with your networking efforts. Check off each item as you complete it.</p>

  <div class="htn-checklist-wrap" id="htnChecklist">
    <div class="htn-checklist-header">Online</div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Send 5 personalized LinkedIn connection requests to alumni, recruiters, or professionals in your target field.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Engage with at least 3 posts on LinkedIn by leaving a thoughtful comment.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Contribute to at least 1 open-source discussion or issue on GitHub.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Share an update about a project, achievement, or learning on LinkedIn.</div>
    </div>

    <div class="htn-checklist-header">In-Person</div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Attend 1 event this month, such as a conference, meetup, or career fair.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Schedule 1 informational interview with a professional in a role or industry you are exploring.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Follow up with everyone you interacted with at an event within 48 hours.</div>
    </div>

    <div class="htn-checklist-header">Ongoing</div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Review and update your LinkedIn profile so it reflects your most recent experience and projects.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="htn-checklist-item" onclick="htnToggleCheck(this)">
      <div class="htn-checklist-checkbox"></div>
      <div class="htn-checklist-text">Push at least 1 project or meaningful commit to your GitHub profile this week.</div>
    </div>

    <div class="htn-checklist-footer">
      <div class="htn-progress-bar">
        <div class="htn-progress-fill" id="htnChecklistFill" style="width:0%"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="htn-progress-label" id="htnChecklistLabel">0 of 9 complete</div>
      <button class="htn-checklist-reset" onclick="htnResetChecklist()">Reset</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<script>
/* -- PANEL SWITCHING -- */
function htnShowPanel(id, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.htn-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.htn-nav-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
  if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo({ top: document.querySelector('.htn-nav').getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - 20, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

/* -- TOC SIDEBAR LINK INTERCEPTION -- */
const htnAnchorMap = {
  'htn-overview':   'htn-overview',
  'htn-why':        'htn-why',
  'htn-online':     'htn-online',
  'htn-inperson':   'htn-inperson',
  'htn-checklist':  'htn-checklist',
};

function htnActivatePanel(targetId) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.htn-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.htn-nav-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  const panel = document.getElementById(targetId);
  if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
  const btn = document.querySelector(`.htn-nav-btn[onclick*="${targetId}"]`);
  if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  const nav = document.querySelector('.htn-nav');
  if (nav) nav.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

function htnInterceptTOCLinks() {
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="#"]').forEach(link => {
    const hash = (link.getAttribute('href') || '').replace(/^.*#/, '');
    if (htnAnchorMap[hash]) {
      link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        htnActivatePanel(htnAnchorMap[hash]);
      });
    }
  });
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  htnInterceptTOCLinks();
  setTimeout(htnInterceptTOCLinks, 400);
  setTimeout(htnInterceptTOCLinks, 1200);
  setTimeout(htnInterceptTOCLinks, 2500);
  setTimeout(htnInterceptTOCLinks, 5000);
  const hash = window.location.hash.replace('#', '');
  if (htnAnchorMap[hash]) htnActivatePanel(htnAnchorMap[hash]);
});

window.addEventListener('hashchange', function() {
  const hash = window.location.hash.replace('#', '');
  if (htnAnchorMap[hash]) htnActivatePanel(htnAnchorMap[hash]);
});

/* -- CHECKLIST -- */
function htnToggleCheck(item) {
  item.classList.toggle('checked');
  item.querySelector('.htn-checklist-checkbox').innerHTML =
    item.classList.contains('checked') ? '✓' : '';
  htnUpdateProgress();
}

function htnUpdateProgress() {
  const items   = document.querySelectorAll('#htnChecklist .htn-checklist-item');
  const checked = document.querySelectorAll('#htnChecklist .htn-checklist-item.checked');
  const total   = items.length;
  const done    = checked.length;
  const pct     = total > 0 ? (done / total * 100).toFixed(0) : 0;
  document.getElementById('htnChecklistFill').style.width  = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('htnChecklistLabel').textContent = done + ' of ' + total + ' complete';
}

function htnResetChecklist() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#htnChecklist .htn-checklist-item').forEach(item => {
    item.classList.remove('checked');
    item.querySelector('.htn-checklist-checkbox').innerHTML = '';
  });
  htnUpdateProgress();
}
</script>
```
